productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Women Sensual Touch Perfume
description: nike fragrances Sensual Touch for women comes in a colour happy flask, styled to look like a sipper, so delectable that your olfactory senses will never get enough of this. Fruity and spicy top notes of tangerine and ginger and base notes of musk and sandalwood. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles. Quantity: 150 ml Caution FlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
